RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0010 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Hana Silva Date of Birth: 07/12/1998 SSN (tokenized): TKN-794072 Annual Income: $49,000 Employer: Globex Loan Amount: $14,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Toronto Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN21650AL Hyundai Elantra 2016 Hybrid New 20,000 VIN66126AL BMW 320i 2025 Hybrid New 50,000 Authorized Signature: Hana Silva
